sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Norges Bank Takes $3.06 Billion Position in Intuit Inc. $INTU

feed.title: Think Constellation Energy Is A Utility Stock? It's Time To Update Your Perspective (CEG)
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) is presented as a key player in the AI-driven energy revolution, supplying 10% of the nation's clean energy. The company reported strong Q1 2026 results with a 63.85% YoY revenue increase to $11.12 billion and an EPS of $2.74, surpassing expectations. Its nuclear fleet achieved a 92.3% capacity factor, highlighting its reliable power generation for high-demand sectors like AI, and its strategic advantages stem from established partnerships, scale, and a diversified generation portfolio.
